Funding Support for Horizon Europe MSCA Doctoral Networks Project Partnered by Dr. Lecturer Deniz Eroğlu

The Horizon Europe MSCA Doctoral Networks project titled “BeyondTheEdge – Higher-Order Networks and Dynamics”, of which Dr. Lecturer Deniz Eroğlu, a faculty member of the Department of Molecular Biology and Genetics, is a partner, has been awarded funding.

The project brings together interdisciplinary researchers from 18 universities and research institutions and will train 10 doctoral students. The project, which covers a wide range of research areas from neuroscience to mathematics, will last 48 months.

We congratulate Dr. Eroğlu and wish her continued success.
